items.title: Of note regarding Ethan Thompson's absence from Pacers in summer league is that he's with Puerto Rico for international ball. So, that's noteworthy, but ex-Pacer Enrique Freeman plans to play in both.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: Of note regarding Ethan Thompson's absence from Pacers in summer league is that he's with Puerto Rico for international ball. So, that's noteworthy, but ex-Pacer Enrique Freeman plans to play in both.

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Minnesota Timberwolves have tendered a qualifying offer to Jaylen Clark and a two-way qualifying offer to Enrique Freeman, a league source told @spotrac.com.

Clark and Freeman will now be restricted free agents this offseason. Clark has reportedly agreed to a new deal already.
